message: 🌱 Add keda: Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremeters for use mission (#376)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-2513-rabbitmq-scaler-allow-providing-separate-paremeters-for-user-and-passw",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremeters for user and password ",
+    "description": "Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremeters for user and password . This issue affects 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify keda feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your keda deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=keda\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremeters for user and password "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Pod configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get pod -A\nkubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n### Proposal\n\nI would like to be able to provide username/password as separate parameters for the RabbitMQ scaler, in order to be able to get host from Environment variable and username/password from "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremeters for use",
+        "description": "Add the possibility to use username/password as separate parameters for the RabbitMQ scaler, as well as domain\n\n### Checklist\n\nFixes #\n\nRelates to #2513\n```yaml\nenvFrom:\r\n  - prefix: RABBITMQ_\r\n    secretRef:\r\n      name: example-deployment-default-user\r\nenv:\r\n  - name: RABBITMQ_ConnectionString\r\n    value: amqp://$(RABBITMQ_username):$(RABBITMQ_password)@$(RABBITMQ_host):$(RABBITMQ_port)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Rabbitmq scaler: Allow providing separate paremete is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Add the possibility to use username/password as separate parameters for the RabbitMQ scaler, as well as domain\n\n### Checklist\n\nFixes #\n\nRelates to #2513. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "envFrom:\r\n  - prefix: RABBITMQ_\r\n    secretRef:\r\n      name: example-deployment-default-user\r\nenv:\r\n  - name: RABBITMQ_ConnectionString\r\n    value: amqp://$(RABBITMQ_username):$(RABBITMQ_password)@$(RABBITMQ_host):$(RABBITMQ_port)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keda",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [

+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Secret"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda/issues/2513",

+    },

+  },

+  },
